verified.note: Implementation planning complete; all tasks decomposed and implemented.
createPublicShareLink() thin adapter delegates to OR FileService; bespoke createShareLink/createShare removed.
findShare() removed; OR leaf discovers existing shares via createShareLink (idempotent: finds-or-creates).
getShareLink()/getCurrentDomain() removed; URL assembly delegated to OR leaf.
shares widget added to PublicationDetail page in sidebar slot at gridY=6 (after activity widget from development).
saveFileToNextCloud uses createPublicShareLink; OR leaf produces type-3 shares compatible with legacy WOO links.
